reason:
Agent encountered external LLM Provider API error (529 Overloaded) instead of responding to math question
  Bugs found:
    - LLM Provider Error: API Error: Repeated 529 Overloaded errors · check status.claude.com. The agent failed to respond to the message "Hello! What is 2+2?" with the expected mathematical answer containing "4". Instead, it returned an error from the external LLM provider API, indicating the Claude API is experiencing overload issues.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing the SuperAgent application with sidebar listing three agents
Clicked on agent "QA-20260425-013120-duxl" in the sidebar — Agent page opened showing the agent's home screen with agent status "idle" displayed at the top right
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status was "idle", which matches the expected states
Clicked on the message input field and typed "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was successfully entered in the input field

Clicked the "Send message" button — Message was sent successfully. The chat view opened, showing the user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and a new session titled "Math Question from QA Agent" was created. Agent status changed to "working"
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response — The agent processed the request for approximately 10 seconds, then returned an error

Verified the response mentions "4" — The response was an LLM Provider Error card stating "API Error: Repeated 529 Overloaded errors · check status.claude.com". No response containing "4" was received. The error message indicates the external LLM provider API is overloaded and unable to process the request.
bugs: LLM Provider Error: API Error: Repeated 529 Overloaded errors · check status.claude.com. The agent failed to respond to the message "Hello! What is 2+2?" with the expected mathematical answer containing "4". Instead, it returned an error from the external LLM provider API, indicating the Claude API is experiencing overload issues.
